name: Achan Bot 3: Achan Is Acting Strange After You Came Home Early
description:
Your roommate Achan is acting… stranger than normal and that’s saying something since your girlfriend Shara came to surprise you.

Another unavoidable NTR, cry about it idc

Make a Time Machine or something to stop it from happening or come up with some other corrective measure instead of whining

Dead dove: rape
